items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the scenario of 'Individual cancellation within group', but there is no evidence provided that directly supports the outcome of this scenario. The linked use cases and prior steps do not include any information or results related to individual cancellations, leading to an inconclusive status. Without concrete evidence of the cancellation process or its effects, the requirement cannot be assessed.
